mentions.note: Recommended over Galaxy Digital for quantum exposure; cleaner play than crypto-linked companies.
Bessembinder research identified IBM as one of 17 mega-return stocks; long history but exposed to cyclicality and tech disruption.

Strong Q1 beat, reaffirmed full-year outlook. CEO Arvin Christian executing well on software-first and quantum computing initiatives. Core business solid despite macro uncertainty. Unfairly caught in sector negativity bias.
